title: Senior Software Engineer - Nature's Basket Holdings Services - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Nature's Basket Holdings Services - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nature's Basket Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Nature's Basket Holdings Services:
Nature's Basket Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket Holdings Services!
